Notice Of Mtoion And Motion To Distribute $4,839.29 To Jerry Cimmet, Matthew Pavone And Julie Garfield
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert White, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Daniel C. Smith
Heather L. Rosing, Esq., for third party and opposing party: Jerry Cimmet

HEARING HELD and Third party Jerry Cimmet's motion to distribute funds is denied without prejudice. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Pltfs' May 15, 2007 Subpoena Issued To Jerry Cimmet
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert White, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Daniel C. Smith
Heather L. Rosing, Esq., for third party and opposing party: Jerry Cimmet

HEARING HELD and Third party Jerry Cimmet's motion to quash May 15, 2007 subpoena is granted in part. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Thiords Party Examinee To Answer Questions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert White, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Daniel C. Smith
Heather L. Rosing, Esq., for third party and opposing party: Jerry Cimmet

HEARING HELD and Plaintiff Daniel Smith's motion for an order compelling third party Examinee to answer question is granted in part. The third party shall provide all records of payment by Genevive Smith, including but not limited to: summary of payments received, redacted bank account and billing information. At the election of counsel for plaintiff, the examination may resume as to the documents to be produced. Compliance by July 16, 2007. The Court will review fee agreements in camera. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Discharged
